title: Apply Bitwise Operations to Make Strings Equal
titleCn: 执行逐位运算使字符串相等

testcases.input: s = "1010", target = "0110" Output: true Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Choose i = 2 and j = 0. We have now s = "0010". - Choose i = 2 and j = 1. We have now s = "0110". Since we can make s equal to target, we return true.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Choose i = 2 and j = 0. We have now s = "0010". - Choose i = 2 and j = 1. We have now s = "0110". Since we can make s equal to target, we return true.

testcases.input: s = "11", target = "00" Output: false Explanation: It is not possible to make s equal to target with any number of operations.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is not possible to make s equal to target with any number of operations.
